triggers.name: on_project_owner_membership
triggers.activation: after insert or update of owner_profile_id

constraints.name: project_members_viewer_regime_check
constraints.expression:
(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

constraints.name: project_invites_viewer_regime_check
constraints.expression:
(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

triggers.name: enforce_tasks_estimate_lineage_scope
triggers.activation: before insert or update of project_id, stage_id, estimate_work_id

constraints.expression: not is_final or task_id is not null

triggers.name: on_inventory_movements_sync_balances
triggers.activation: after insert or update or delete

constraints.expression: not is_final or task_id is not null
